summary: Completed e2e testing of iteration 4 features: AnalyticsView with recharts, InviteUsersModal, AutomationsModal with Monday-style conditions, OptionsManagerModal with color picker. Fixed critical bug in server.py (ADMIN_EMAIL undefined). Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All tested features working.

fixed.issue: Line 928 referenced undefined variable ADMIN_EMAIL (should be ADMIN_EMAILS)
fixed.fix: Changed `if user_id == ADMIN_EMAIL:` to `if user_id in ADMIN_EMAILS:`

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside tr/tbody/th) - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality. Known issue from iteration 2/3.

BACKEND: PUT /api/config/colors saves color mappings (admin only)
BACKEND: GET /api/config/colors returns 401 without auth
BACKEND: GET /api/users returns list of users (admin only)
BACKEND: GET /api/users returns 401 without auth
BACKEND: POST /api/users/invite creates new user entry

BACKEND: POST /api/users/invite returns 400 for invalid email
BACKEND: PUT /api/users/{id}/role updates user role
BACKEND: DELETE /api/users/{id} removes user
BACKEND: DELETE /api/users/{admin_email} returns 400 (protected)
BACKEND: DELETE /api/users/{nonexistent} returns 404
BACKEND: GET /api/config/options returns all categories
BACKEND: GET /api/automations returns list

BACKEND: GET /api/orders returns list
BACKEND: POST /api/orders creates order in SCHEDULING

critical_code_review_comments: React hydration warnings persist - span elements inside tr/tbody/th. Low priority cosmetic issue.
FIXED: ADMIN_EMAIL was undefined in DELETE /api/users endpoint - changed to use ADMIN_EMAILS list

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new features (Analytics, Invite Users, Automations, Options Manager) working

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and orders from previous iterations. Backend tests auto-cleanup test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified: 1) AnalyticsView with recharts charts (Production Status bar, Priority pie, Orders by Board pie, Top Clients, Artwork/Blank status) and Excel/PDF export. 2) InviteUsersModal for admin user management with role dropdowns. 3) AutomationsModal rewritten with Monday-style column conditions (trigger_conditions object with column=value pairs). 4) OptionsManagerModal with color picker per status value. 5) Backend endpoints: /api/config/colors (GET/PUT), /api/users (GET), /api/users/invite (POST), /api/users/{id}/role (PUT), DELETE /api/users/{id}. Fixed critical bug: ADMIN_EMAIL undefined -> ADMIN_EMAILS. Test session still valid.

features_verified.analytics_dashboard: Working - shows summary cards, bar charts, pie charts with real order data
features_verified.invite_users_modal: Working - admin can invite users by Google email, change roles, delete users
features_verified.automations_monday_style: Working - condition builder with column dropdown + value selection
features_verified.options_manager_colors: Working - color swatches clickable, color picker opens, colors saveable
features_verified.theme_toggle: Working - dark/light themes with proper text contrast
features_verified.order_column_overlap: NOT OBSERVED - order numbers display fully, 160px column width adequate
